/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o ../lib/libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/user/Documents/JaJaDocuments/RoboticsDevelopWork2026/DataSource/DepthCamera/mo_stereo_camera_driver_v1.4.7_alpha_release_22_11_29/own_sample/build/gtest/lib ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
